title: cyperus uniflorus
intro: Cyperus uniflorus, also known as the umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus uniflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-diarrheal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
